name: CTA with right-side image (default — Purple + Email_Primary_2_column.png)
description: Default CTA variant: copy + button left (58%), approved image right (42%), on the image's required Purple background. Heading/body white; white-filled button with green label per dark-background rule.
notes: Swap variants by changing both background-color and image src together: LPGA content → #0F99BC + Email_Primary_column_golf.png; alternate general → #7B7BED + Cake lockup.
